title: cephalocarpus obovoideus
intro: Cephalocarpus obovoideus, also known as the Chinese club moss or lycopodiaceous plant, is a type of ancient vascular plant that belongs to the group Lycopodiophyta. This plant is traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Cephalocarpus obovoideus include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory issues, as well as its potential to boost the immune system. Cephalocarpus obovoideus is often used in herbal preparations, such as teas and infusions, where it is typically combined with other medicinal herbs to enhance its effects.
